files.name: consistency.go
files.description: Verifies spot and category counts across the 12 subsystems.

functions.name: EvaluateConsistency
functions.sig: func (ce *ConsistencyEngine) EvaluateConsistency(ctx context.Context, searchCounts map[string]int) ([]ConsistencyResult, bool, error)
functions.notes: Generates consistency report comparing DB/Search/SLA/Storm counts.

files.name: factory.go
files.description: Orchestrates the 16-stage import transaction and validation gate.

functions.name: ProcessImportSpot
functions.sig: func (df *DatasetFactory) ProcessImportSpot(ctx context.Context, spot *models.Spot, dna *models.SpotDNA, activeStorms map[string]*models.Storm, isDryRun bool, onCommit func(name, id, slug string)) error
functions.notes: Executes all 16 stages and blocks/rolls back on validation failures.

files.name: planner.go
files.description: Calculates priority scoring and roadmap estimates for the 8 top-level domains.

functions.name: CalculateExpansionPlan
functions.notes: Determines priority scores and outputs roadmap plans.

files.name: library.go
files.description: Reusable calibration profile library with parameter inheritance and versioning.

functions.name: DetectRegression
functions.sig: func (cl *CalibrationLibrary) DetectRegression(ctx context.Context, profileID string) (bool, string, error)
functions.notes: Performs regression checking using RMSE history.

files.name: dna_governance.go
files.description: Checks the 18 parameter completeness check for Spot DNA configurations.

functions.name: ComputeDNACompleteness
functions.notes: Calculates DNA completeness score (0-100%).

files.name: governance.go
files.description: Calculates and persists dynamic spot dataset health model scores.

functions.name: ComputeSpotHealth
functions.sig: func (ge *GovernanceEngine) ComputeSpotHealth(ctx context.Context, spot *models.Spot, dna *models.SpotDNA, storms map[string]*models.Storm) *SpotDatasetHealth
functions.notes: Calculates 9 sub-scores dynamically based on database entries

functions.name: PersistHealth
functions.notes: Caches the health scores inside Postgres spot_health table

files.name: release_gate.go
files.description: Checks all blocking and release gate criteria for production readiness.

functions.name: Evaluate
functions.sig: func (rg *ReleaseGate) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, spots []models.Spot, dnas map[string]*models.SpotDNA, healths []SpotDatasetHealth, duplicateCoords, brokenRefs, invalidInheritance []string) *ReleaseGateStatus
functions.notes: Evaluates release checklist criteria and writes release gate reports

files.name: audit.go
files.description: Performs global dataset audits including coordinate clashes and geometry check.

functions.name: RunGlobalDatasetAudit
functions.sig: func (ae *AuditEngine) RunGlobalDatasetAudit(ctx context.Context, storms map[string]*models.Storm) (*GlobalAuditResult, error)
functions.notes: Audits 9-tier relationships, duplicates, and missing metadata

files.name: quality.go
files.description: Enforces quality gate checks on newly imported spots payloads.

functions.name: ValidatePayload
functions.notes: Validates coordinate bounds, missing files, and 500m proximity clashes

files.name: recommendation.go
files.description: Generates prioritized AI recommendations for unoptimized metadata profiles.

functions.name: GenerateRecommendations

functions.notes: Scans spots/DNA/calibrations and stores recommendations in DB

files.description: Identifies similar twin surf spots across 12 variables.

functions.notes: Compares spots and generates a similarity percentage matrix
